'''Bad-eye''' was the nickname [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] gave to a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Peace Brigade]] who advised [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Darez Wuht]] during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]]. She named him so due to the fact one of his [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] seemed to be a malfunctioning prosthetic.
